notes: Simplified the launcher so setup focuses on choosing the Workspace and checking for updates.
Theme choice now happens inside the app rather than in the launcher.
Reordered the app sidebar to support the workflow: Home, Review Queue, Areas, Routines, Goals, Tasklist, exports, and Settings.
Simplified Areas and Specific area handling so Pathmark quietly maintains Workspace folders and Markdown files when goals and routines are saved.
Reframed standard routines as optional suggested starter routines for system support and wellbeing.
Tightened Review Queue filtering so unnumbered and system folders are ignored.
